extension.name: SAML Authentication
extension.description: SAML2-based Single Sign-On for CiviCRM Standalone. Supports Okta and other SAML2 identity providers with SSO enforcement and emergency bypass capability.

compatibility.comments: Semantic versioning. For example, compatibility with "6.1" implies compatibility with "6.2".

php_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "8.1" and "8.2".

smarty_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "4" and "5".

extension.comments: Provides SAML2-based Single Sign-On authentication with support for multiple identity providers including Okta. Features SSO enforcement mode and emergency bypass mechanism.
